untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external macro indicators (Continuing Claims, Treasury Yield) not in the allowed indicator list. These are not price-based technical indicators available in standard OHLCV data. The signal depends on economic data sources (unemployment/claims data and bond yields) that fall outside the scope of price-action and technical analysis indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_2 is a macroeconomic regime signal requiring: (1) Continuing Claims data vs 12-month and 1-period lags, (2) Treasury Yield data vs 4-month lag. Neither indicator exists in the allowed set which is restricted to price, volume, and technical indicators derived from OHLCV. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to be extended with macro data connectors for unemployment claims and yield curves.
